purpose_en: Constitutional boundary discovered under runtime pressure — not a failure, not legitimacy.
finding_en: Pass 1 revealed the epistemic ceiling of assisted interaction without visual corroboration.

invariants_proven.en: Assisted interaction without observable state change remains epistemically insufficient.
Beyond partial_assisted, runtime phenomenology requires human visual corroboration to remain responsible.

question_shift_en: Which observed state transitions can survive epistemic restraint?
next_step_en: Human Visual Pass — not automation escalation.
